name: Yashima Denki Co., Ltd.
summary: Yashima Denki Co., Ltd. provides plant systems, and industrial and transportation systems in Japan and internationally. The company offers plants and equipment related to oil, chemical, and gas businesses; private electrical power facilities; substation and power distribution equipment; monitoring equipment and various electrical control devices; energy-saving equipment; and solar power systems, as well as steel systems. It also provides industrial equipment and energy-saving products, such as drive control devices, inspection devices, and process control systems, as well as high and low pressure power-supply, production, and renewable-energy-related facilities; air-conditioning, chiller, and refrigerator equipment; LED lighting products; and IT solutions comprising production control, security, camera surveillance, and entrance and exit control systems, as well as develops and distributes various software. In addition, the company offers social/public systems, including aviation-related, water supply and sewerage, supervisory control, power, and solar power systems, as well as water treatment cleanup facilities and industrial instruments; and transportation systems consisting of vehicles, electrical products for vehicles, electrical transmission and distribution system monitor and control equipment, platform screen doors, signal systems, and digital signage. Further, it provides electronic devices and components, including liquid crystal display modules, batteries, sensors, passive parts, and other components. The company was formerly known as Yashima Denki Shokai Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Yashima Denki Co., Ltd. in February 1960. Yashima Denki Co., Ltd. was founded in 1946 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
